entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company; technical strategy should focus on measuring agency rather than keyword matching

entities.name: proxy for agency
entities.context: Method to identify and unlock the 70% of high-potential invisible talent; primary competitive advantage in hiring

entities.name: agency
entities.context: The capacity to act independently and effectively; requires high-fidelity data to measure

entities.name: invisible talent
entities.context: 70% of the talent pool not captured by visible signals like prestige titles and resumes

entities.name: visible signals
entities.context: Low-resolution heuristic signals like resumes and brand-name companies; represent only 30% of talent pool

entities.name: talent arbitrage
entities.context: Shifting value proposition from sourcing to discovering hidden value; providing superior talent at lower costs

entities.name: value investing
entities.context: Analogous framework - finding assets whose intrinsic value is not reflected in current market signals

relationships.context: Technical strategy should focus on measuring agency to identify invisible talent
Value proposition shifts from sourcing to arbitrage by discovering hidden talent value
Proxy serves as the measurement mechanism for identifying agency in candidates
Agency is the key characteristic that makes invisible talent high-potential
Analogous strategies - both seek intrinsic value not reflected in market signals
Visible signals capture only 30%, leaving 70% invisible talent unidentified
